introSection: Golden Wings in Snowfield is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Chaoyang, Beijing, China. It is the first of only two Shenlin w/Helix inverted coasters built by Vekoma; the other being Dragon in Clouds at Happy Valley.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: When the ride opened, it was painted yellow with purple supports. Between 2010 and 2012, it was repainted white with blue supports.

fullText:
Golden Wings in Snowfield is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Chaoyang, Beijing, China. It is the first of only two Shenlin w/Helix inverted coasters built by Vekoma; the other being Dragon in Clouds at Happy Valley.



When the ride opened, it was painted yellow with purple supports. Between 2010 and 2012, it was repainted white with blue supports.
